title: Rei and Kaworu The True Impact Triggers
display_title: Rei and Kaworu The True Impact Triggers
wikitext:
[]: Rei and Kaworu: The True Impact Triggers?             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 2:09 pm [Split from "How is Shinji responsible for 3rd Impact?" - Monk] pwhodges wrote: Kaworu says the DSS was made for him; but what if he means that it was made for the impact trigger ? If Kaworu is the true impact trigger in this case, rather than Shinji, maybe Wille got it wrong and Shinji isn't an impact trigger at all ! So how did N3I start? Well, whose nature is nearest to that of Kaworu, and was in EVA-01 at the time it awakened? - Rei, that's who.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Oct 21, 2013 2:12 pm [quote=" monitoradiation":2v24igvz][/quote:2v24igvz] I like this theory.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 2:38 pm Giji Shinka wrote: I like this theory.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Oct 21, 2013 2:45 pm Don't take it too seriously, It's JUST anime. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 2:59 pm Giji Shinka wrote: Don't take it too seriously, It's JUST anime. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Oct 21, 2013 3:55 pm pwhodges wrote: Kaworu says the DSS was made for him; but what if he means that it was made for the impact trigger ? If Kaworu is the true impact trigger in this case, rather than Shinji, maybe Wille got it wrong and Shinji isn't an impact trigger at all ! So how did N3I start? Well, whose nature is nearest to that of Kaworu, and was in EVA-01 at the time it awakened? - Rei, that's who. Rei and Kaworu; souls of Seeds of Life; awakening agents; impact triggers?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Oct 21, 2013 5:42 pm Yeah, I got the timing wrong; but there's still the possibility that an awakened Eva (awakened by Shinji) requires an impact trigger (maybe not Shinji?) to reach the point of causing an actual impact. We still need some way to reconcile all the things we know about the DSS, I think, and how 3I happened while Shinji was shut away.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Oct 21, 2013 6:08 pm Well, Kaworu was first designed to wake Mark.06 and start HIP with it all by himself, before everyone's plans had gone to hell during the time skip. Granted the fact he was an Angel(and better yet, a SoL) could mean that he had the capactity to wake his Eva and trigger an Impact all by himself, while an human Impact Trigger can only awake an Eva and need a second soul to trigger the Impact(Rei or Kaworu) Although I admit that I would really hate it if it's true, because that would mean that the whole plot of Q was moot : do you imagine if Shinji comes back to the Wunder and Misato told him "Hey Shinji-kun, do you remember all the hard stares we gave you, and the explosive collar with me threatening you to death because you can causes Impacts if you ever get into an Eva? Well that was all a misunderstanding, you see we made an error with the scanner, you can't trigger an Impact all by yourself, so that whole "Choker symbolizing you punishment and our mistrust in you" business wasn't necessary at all, soooo... no hard feelings 'kay? Hey why are your eyes glowing red sudden-" I mean, seriously? Can you imagine that the core of Q's plot and Shinji's insanity which almost unleashed the apocalypse was just an error from Ritsuko's part?! So yeah, for me Shinji can awake an Evangelion and trigger an impact, but if a limitation is to be made, I could see that only certain Evas can reach proper awakening(repurposed ADAM and born from Lilith's flesh) the others "normal" Eva being only able to get as far as pseudo-evolved mode, but not beyond. That would give to Shinji a chance to be seen piloting again in FINAL, while giving him his own super-mode to compete with Beast Mode, of course with some limitations to not make it too overpowered, like it strains his body a lot, damages the Eva with prolonged use since it's a simple clone of ADAM, or makes Shinji diving very quickly toward the Great Beyond Depth, this time without Rei or Yui to bail him out if he gets absorbed.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 11:26 pm ElMariachi wrote: Although I admit that I would really hate it if it's true, because that would mean that the whole plot of Q was moot : do you imagine if Shinji comes back to the Wunder and Misato told him "Hey Shinji-kun, do you remember all the hard stares who gave you, and the explosive collar with me threatening you to death because you can causes Impacts if you ever get into an Eva? Well that was all a misunderstanding, you see we made an error with the scanner, you can't trigger an Impact all by yourself, so that whole "Choker symbolizing you punishment and our mistrust in you" business wasn't necessary at all, soooo... no hard feelings 'kay? Hey why are your eyes glowing red sudden-"

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Tue Oct 22, 2013 1:05 am Heh, the fact that Shinji is essentially the new Impact Trigger makes him essentially more of the Rei Ayanami character from the original series than Rei Ayanami is at this point. Add onto the fact that his self-worth is at the same level as the original Rei's, and that he was found in the Entry Plug by Asuka at the end of 3.0, mirroring Rei being found and rescued by Shinji.....

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Tue Oct 22, 2013 3:12 am Minus all the support Shinji tried give to Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 3:15 am Well, you can say that Asuka manhandling Shinji was her way to support him, except that well, it's Asuka, so she plays rough!

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 3:51 am Just hypothetically, since Gendo wanted to cause at the very least the initiation of 4I, lets just look at what's going on here, we have: 1. Kaworu, the first angel 2. Eva-13, one of the surviving ADAMS 3. The twelfth angel, eaten by Eva-13 during it's awakening 4. Two, count 'em, Lances of Longinus 5. Maaaaaaybe Lilith, maybe not 6. Evangelion Mk. 09, with Rei Q, who presumably holds Lilith's soul, piloting Taking this into account, as well as Kaworu's fall from first to thirteenth, plus Shinji in the whole mix, that's a solid almost 10 triggers for the Fourth Impact. Seems Gendo had all his bases covered.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Oct 22, 2013 5:57 am It is interesting to note that Eva Mark.09 only goes into the whole "Adam's vessel" state and reaches the full extent of its power once Fourth Impact starts up... although since the SEELE dummy program was also involved there's heavy indications that Rei wasn't doing it, at least not voluntarily. Rei leaving the Mark.09 also doesn't visibly affect the Mark.09 or the Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 6:53 am Well, since we don't know what exactly is an ADAM's Vessel(add it to the list of thing we don't know a fuck about), we don't know what its capabilities are : maybe the SEELE Dummy System can do this "pseudo-evolving" thing at any time but didn't deemed it necessary to use it before(and indeed, it managed to make WILLE's life hell during probably years without being damaged to the point it would reveal its true nature), or maybe it needs an awakened ADAM nearby(here EVA-13) to be powered up, the awakened being serving as a "wireless umbilical cable"! After all, it developed an halo and started to fly at the same time EVA-13 awoke, before it started 4I. But overall the ADAM's Vessel seems to don't have any influence in the Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 8:03 am Just hypothetically, what if there was no dummy operating at all, and Mk. 09 was acting on it's own, like as a creature. Presuming it's one of the ADAMS, when awakened it's probably more intelligent than Unit-01 when she goes beserk? I don't know if I worded that well. My point is maybe Eva-13 and Mk. 09 were acting on their own, trying to complete the fourth impact, to destroy the Lilin, considering the Lilin were the technically incorrect successors of the ADAMS children. Ugh I've worded that awfully, I don't know exactly how to explain it.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 9:07 am Well, the spamming of SEELE's logo all over Rei-Q's entry plug and later on the Wunder Hirnstamm tower's screen seems to rule out the possibility that its acting of its own, that's clearly a Dummy System created by SEELE! As for EVA-13, well it's indeed possible that once awakened, it acted by instinct, which is to trigger an Impact, and the spears serves as "rods" to make the Eva's Impact go to have certain desired effect. Which raise again the question of what was the role of the LoL in it, since even with two LoL Fuyutsuki said that nearly everything went as SEELE wished, implying that they just needed the Longinus? Was the LoC supposed to counter the Instrumentality triggering effect of the LoL? But if so why did SEELE's new scenario after the time skip seems to have included the LoC in it? After all, EVA-13 was build with two extra arms to wield both spears simultaneously, so why did SEELE bothered to do that if they only intended to use the LoL? So, in the end, does that mean that HIP would had happened even if Kaworu's plan worked and there was two different spears, but will also repair the world with the Cassius(after all a living planet is more pleasant to live, event after being ascended to godlike beings, or maybe that was part of a deal Kaworu made with SEELE so they would have to bring Shinji back) and he lied by omission to Shinji about what exactly will his plan accomplish? If you remember, at no point in the Rebuild Kaworu mentioned that he was against HIP or SEELE, he never even mentioned SEELE to Shinji, and only talked about thwarting NERV 's plans, while the plan is supposed to be SEELE's : 01:02:34 {Kaworu} Ikari Shinji-kun, your only hope lies with the two Spears left at the Impact epicenter in Dogma. 01:02:41 {Kaworu} They are the keys to invoking the Instrumentality Project. 01:02:45 {Kaworu} We should take those Spears for ourselves. 01:02:48 {Kaworu} That way, Nerv can no longer trigger the Fourth Impact ,

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Wed Oct 23, 2013 9:55 am Late to the party but I really like this theory. It basically suggests that a human can, at sufficiently high synchronization/rage levels, cause the Eva to evolve and use it's AT field offensively. But to go full awakened/evolved, giant light being, you need a Rei or a Kaworu. Which makes *them* the triggers. If Kaworu wasn't doing anything, why did the DSS choker activate? We don't ever see Misato pull the trigger and earlier in the movie it's quite clearly implied that she's incapable of doing so. Therefore, Kaworu triggered the choker by himself; he's obviously more than a simple passenger. This is further proven by the fact that Kaworu believes the process can be ENDED by his own action as well. Why, if he didn't start it, does he think he can end it? He stabs the Eva and goes pop, but the process surprisingly keeps on going. If he was truly locked out of the controls by Shinji, he shouldn't have even been able to do the spear thing... The last piece of the puzzle is Mari's comment about Shinji being the backup. Well, if Shinji's the backup, then Kaworu was always the primary trigger . Shinji's only there to keep the Eva active (via synchronization) if Kaworu is killed. (Side note: if true, this makes Kaworu a truly manipulative bastard, to fake all that confusion and tell Shinji not to pull the spears. But then, Kaworu also showed him 3I and dropped the guilt bomb.) I think it's safe to say 4th Impact wasn't Shinji at all. Which begs the question of whether he was responsible for the third, or if it was Rei that caused the giant being of light. I don't think there's any question that Shinji can make an Eva kick some ass with AT fields and lasers, but Impacts may not be on that list. WILLE may not even realize Shinji succeeded in pulling Rei across the core barrier and into his plug. They retrieve his SDAT, but only Shinji realizes the significance of this since Rei was the one who fished it out of the trash and presumably Rei is the only one who even knows he'd thrown it away to begin with. Edited to add one last bit of supporting speculation. Who told us Mark.06 was autonomous? Kaworu. Where is Mark.06? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 23, 2013 10:46 am Well, Kaworu explicitly said he's the trigger for Fourth Impact : 01:24:02 {Shinji} This is all because of me...? 01:24:06 {Shinji} I... I... 01:24:12 {Kaworu} It's not your fault. 01:24:15 {Kaworu} It happened because I became the Thirteenth Angel. 01:24:19 {Kaworu} I was the trigger.

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Wed Oct 23, 2013 12:34 pm ElMariachi wrote: Well, it's possible if Mark.06 wxas using the spear and not being impaled with it : he said that two soul are required to wield a spear, so by logic one soul is required to wield one... so if what we're seeing is Mark.06 impaling itself with a spear, it means that it was piloted by someone, because if it was autonomous, that means that there weren't a soul(the pilot) to wield said spear!

If Kaworu is the true impact trigger in this case, rather than Shinji, maybe Wille got it wrong and Shinji isn't an impact trigger at
